text: What NSE and Jio Platforms IPOs reveal about India's changing economy. NSE and Jio Platforms embody the sweeping changes in how India has consumed, invested and transacted over the past decade.

Stock market today: Which are the top gainers and losers in BSE Sensex and Nifty50 today? Check list. India Business News: Benchmark equity indices Sensex and Nifty ended lower on Monday as renewed hostilities between the US and Iran and a rise in global crude oil prices d.

Stock markets today: Sensex, Nifty opened in red, then recovered. Market benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty drifted lower in early trade on Monday amid renewed hostilities between the US and Iran.

The 30-share BSE Sensex declined 63.65 points to 77,047.63 during initial trading.

The 50-share NSE Nifty went marginally up by 16.55  points to 24,070.20.

Later, the BSE benchmark dropped 246.54 points to 76,853.93, and the Nifty dipped 50.55 points to 24,005.45. Track Sensex, Nifty on June 29.
